title: wolfhsm: transport.rs and client.rs
description: transport.rs: Transport enum with Tcp{host,port}, Shm{name}, Uds{path}, Tls{host,port,...}. client.rs: Client struct wrapping RefCell<Box<whClientContext>> (making it !Send+!Sync) plus _transport: Box<dyn Any> owning C transport config structs (must outlive ctx). Client::connect(transport) allocates and initializes C transport config, calls wh_Client_Init; echo() and info() methods; Drop calls wh_Client_CommClose then wh_Client_Cleanup. Document that callers use Mutex<Client>+spawn_blocking for async.
